title: CreateImageRequest
description: Request body for creating image generations.

prompt.description: A text description of the desired image(s).

n.description: The number of images to generate.

size.description: The size of the generated images.

quality.description: The quality of the image that will be generated.

style.description: The style of the generated images.

response_format.description: The format in which the generated images are returned.

user.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user.
